changelog.change: Strip images and layout path from splits file before uploading to reduce file size
Remove ConfigureAwait(false) to fix component crashes (LiveSplit#2677)
Fixed LiveSplit freezing on close when stats uploading is enabled
Skip upload on close when Sync on Reset is enabled
Fixed Test button staying greyed out when navigating back to settings
Added HTTP timeout to prevent button from hanging indefinitely
Auto-validate upload key on startup with connection status indicator
User profile and live page link shown in settings
Sync status displayed in component name
Toast notifications for stats sync progress
Settings panel with info about therun.gg features and tooltips
Fixed event handler memory leak in Dispose
Code cleanup and MemoryStream disposal fix
